notes: New England Botanic Garden at Tower Hill (nebg.org) — all page fetches return truncated content due to length; no admission prices extracted from any URL tried (/, /visit, /visit/, /admission, /tickets, /plan-your-visit, /tower-hill, etc.). Discount programs known: EBT $2 each (Sept-May) or free (June-Aug); military 25% off or free (Blue Star May-Sep); MTA educators free; library passes half-price for 2 tickets; Boylston residents free.
